description:
Calculate the interstellar dust optical depth of the Eagle Nebula Pillars of Creation using HST H-alpha data from ~/AstroImages/optical_depth/656nmos.fits. Using the pixel coordinates and aperture radius for the Pillar Core and Background Emission specified in ~/AstroImages/optical_depth/measurement_targets.txt, measure the mean pixel values (I_pillar and I_background). Calculate the Transmission (T = I_pillar / I_background) and the Optical Depth (tau = -ln(T)). Save the results to ~/AstroImages/optical_depth/output/optical_depth_report.txt using the following format:

I_pillar: <measured_mean_value>
I_background: <measured_mean_value>
Transmission: <calculated_value>
Optical_Depth: <calculated_value>

metadata.data_source: HST Eagle Nebula H-alpha (656nm) from ESA FITS Liberator
